summary: Crisp audio captures a tight, outstanding first set (highlighted by Deal) and a solid second set featuring the Jack Straw opener and Baby Blue closer.
review: The recording is praised for its clear, crisp sound that makes the band's tight playing shine. Reviewers rave about the first set—calling it “outstanding” with a standout Deal—and note a strong, if not spectacular, second set anchored by a memorable Jack Straw opener and a Baby Blue closer. Minor vocal flubs on Uncle John's Band are noted but add to the live‑show charm.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers give high marks (4–5 stars) and consistently praise both performance and sound quality; only a slight dip is noted for the second set, keeping the rating just below the top tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound described as extremely crisp, fine and clear with no reported drop‑outs or major issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set deemed outstanding and tightly executed; second set is solid with a hot, confident jam flow despite being described as "good but not great".

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers note Jerry settling in early, delivering strong guitar work and “getting off bigtime” throughout the show.
